title: 8 Signs You've Found a Real Brother
caption:
Most men have acquaintances they call brothers.

Not because they're lying — because they've never seen what a real one looks like. They've had people around, been in the same group chat, shown up to the same events. But they've never had a man who saw the whole thing and didn't leave.

Scripture doesn't call it a small group. It calls it iron sharpening iron. It calls it confessing to one another that you may be healed. That's not a panel discussion. That's two men who know each other well enough to actually do something.

If you've got even one man who clears this list — protect that. Show up for him the way he shows up for you. That kind of brotherhood is rarer than it should be and worth more than almost anything else you'll build in your twenties.

Tag the brother who clears this list.

#faith #christianmen #brotherhood #godlymen #manofgod #discipleship #masculinity #christianity
